### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/ocicrypt (github.com/containers/ocicrypt)</summary>

### [`v1.3.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/ocicrypt/releases/tag/v1.3.0): ocicrypt v1.3.0

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/ocicrypt/compare/v1.2.1...v1.3.0)

##### What's changed:

- Introduce TLS support for the gRPC key provider.
- Update of dependencies: go-jose to v4.1.4, grpc to 1.79.3, x/net to 0.38.0

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/containers/ocicrypt/compare/v1.2.1...v1.3.0>

</details>

comments.body: For the record, this adds another TLS client which is not configurable by `BaseTLS`. We’ll leave that for now.
